title: Why Graham Platner’s meteoric rise is so unexpected
description: The progressive oysterman is finding traction in a state that has a long track record of electing senators perceived as moderates.
content: The progressive oysterman is finding traction in a state that has a long track record of electing senators perceived as moderates.
